member.name: T:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.Function
member.summary: Entry point da Lambda: recebe Stream (JSON), adapta para eventos e delega ao handler.

member.name: M:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.Function.#ctor
member.summary: Construtor público para o runtime Lambda.

member.name: M:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.Function.#ctor(System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Construtor interno para testes (injeção de dependência).

member.name: M:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.Function.Handler(System.IO.Stream,Amazon.Lambda.Core.ILambdaContext)
member.summary: Handler invocado pelo runtime: lê Stream, normaliza eventos, processa e retorna última resposta de sucesso ou erro.

member.name: T:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.IOrchestratorEventAdapter
member.summary: Adaptador que normaliza o evento bruto (envelope SQS ou JSON direto) em lista de .

member.name: M:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.IOrchestratorEventAdapter.FromRawEvent(System.Text.Json.JsonDocument)
member.summary: Converte o evento bruto (JsonDocument) em lista de eventos normalizados.

member.name: T:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.IOrchestratorHandler
member.summary: Handler que processa um evento normalizado e retorna a resposta da Lambda.

member.name: M:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.IOrchestratorHandler.HandleAsync(VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.Models.OrchestratorLambdaEvent,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processa um evento e retorna a resposta (mock echo).

member.name: T:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.Models.OrchestratorLambdaEvent
member.summary: Evento de entrada da Lambda (payload normalizado a partir de SQS ou JSON direto).

member.name: T:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.Models.OrchestratorLambdaResponse
member.summary: Resposta da Lambda (echo mock com statusCode, jobId, correlationId, etc.).

member.name: M:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.Models.OrchestratorLambdaResponse.Ok(VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Application.Models.ResponseModels.OrchestratorJobResponseModel)
member.summary: Resposta de sucesso (200) a partir do response do use case.

member.name: T:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.OrchestratorEventAdapter
member.summary: Implementação do adaptador: detecta envelope SQS (Records[].body) ou JSON direto.

member.name: M:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.OrchestratorEventAdapter.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.OrchestratorEventAdapter})
member.summary: Implementação do adaptador: detecta envelope SQS (Records[].body) ou JSON direto.

member.name: T:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.OrchestratorHandler
member.summary: Handler que mapeia evento → input, chama use case e retorna OrchestratorLambdaResponse.

member.name: M:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.OrchestratorHandler.#ctor(VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Application.Ports.IOrchestratorJobUseCase,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.OrchestratorHandler})
member.summary: Handler que mapeia evento → input, chama use case e retorna OrchestratorLambdaResponse.

member.name: T:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.Startup
member.summary: Bootstrap da injeção de dependência (sem AddAWSLambdaHosting).

member.name: M:VideoProcessing.VideoOrchestrator.Lambda.Startup.BuildServiceProvider
member.summary: Constrói o service provider com todos os serviços registrados.
